1.project_desc: Built in React, I worked with Claude AI to build this site for my side work: Making Graphics/Merch/Websites/Media for local churches.

2.project_desc: This project combined both design and development work. This project transformed a manual, high-friction onboarding process into a brand new user experience.

3.project_desc: This project combined both design and development work. We were working with two outdated, poorly structured forms. The goal was to reduce that friction, minimize support requests, and modernize the overall user experience.

4.project_desc: What is so unique about this portfolio site? It is a pixel-perfect implementation of TailwindCSS's 'Spotlight' template, but completely converted by hand into Vue (from React)

5.project_desc: A simple Vue3 project that consumes the PokeDex API, giving you a sleek UI to see the wonderful world of Pokemon. (In progress)
